caption: An aerial view captures a dense urban landscape featuring several high-rise buildings under a bright, partly cloudy sky. In the foreground, a prominent white modern skyscraper with a grid-like facade stands alongside other taller structures, including a tan building with a peaked top and a slender white tower. The cityscape includes a mix of commercial buildings, roads, and patches of greenery, extending toward a distant horizon where a body of water is visible. On-screen text reading "TIGER REAL ESTATE LLC" is superimposed over the center-right portion of the buildings. As the sequence progresses, the camera slowly pans and tilts, shifting the perspective slightly to the left and downward, causing the buildings to shift their position in the frame while maintaining a wide-angle view of the surrounding metropolitan area. No people are visible in the wide shot.
